description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows pip build that runs on every push to master and on pull requests to master. Use a single windows-2022 job that checks out the repository, sets up the build environment, installs Python 3.13, upgrades pip, installs Qt 6.9.0, installs Python dependencies from requirements.txt, builds the package with python setup.py build_ext --inplace, and runs tests with specific environment variables.
